display.purpose: Landing hero and title cards — the broadcast title-card. UPPERCASE, weight 900, tight tracking.

headline.purpose: Group name / page title — the chyron's main bar.

title.purpose: Stat values and leader names — heavy, read fast.

label.purpose: The signature: tracked black-caps micro-type. Kickers, table headers, nav, form labels, badges.

shadows.name: sheet-lift
shadows.purpose: Mobile 'All Games' bottom sheet sliding up over the page. Overlay only.

shadows.name: modal-lift
shadows.purpose: Centered confirmation dialogs above their black/40 backdrop. Overlay only.

motion.name: color-shift
motion.purpose: Default hover/active feedback on buttons, rows, nav. Color-shift only — no transform, no bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The tap target — every primary action. Live Orange pill, black-caps, color-shift on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-win, #f97316); color: var(--color-ink, #1c1917); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #fb923c; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fbbf24; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: The not-primary action — keeps orange scarce. Bordered pill on cream.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--color-muted, #78716c); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.025em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 32px; border: 2px solid var(--color-warm, #f0e0b8); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--color-card, #fff7ed); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fbbf24; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat Card Cream surface, sand hairline, no rest shadow. Interactive cards wash to hover-tint.
components.css: .ds-card { display: block; background: var(--color-card, #fff7ed); border: 1px solid var(--color-warm, #f0e0b8); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-card:hover { background: #fffbeb; } .ds-card-icon { font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-ink, #1c1917); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-name { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 14px; color: var(--color-ink, #1c1917); } .ds-card-stat { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px; color: var(--color-muted, #78716c); }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Compact centered metric — big black value over a tracked muted label.
components.css: .ds-stat { background: var(--color-card, #fff7ed); border: 1px solid var(--color-warm, #f0e0b8); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; text-align: center; } .ds-stat-value { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 18px; color: var(--color-ink, #1c1917); margin: 0; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-muted, #78716c); margin: 4px 0 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Cream fill, sand border, small radius. Focus shifts border to Live Orange.
components.css: .ds-field { display: block; } .ds-field-label { display: block; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-muted, #78716c); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-input { background: var(--color-card, #fff7ed); border: 1px solid var(--color-warm, #f0e0b8); border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: var(--color-ink, #1c1917); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-muted, #78716c); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-win, #f97316); }

components.name: Badge Pill
components.description: Tiny role/status pill in tracked black-caps. Shown here in the Field Forest 'pinned' variant.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; background: var(--color-forest, #1a4731); color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Leaderboard Row
components.description: The signature scoreboard row — theatrical rank, hairline separators, colorized stat.
components.html:
#PlayerWDiff
🥇Marcus12+34
2Priya9-8
components.css: .ds-lb { background: var(--color-card, #fff7ed); border: 1px solid var(--color-warm, #f0e0b8); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-lb-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; } .ds-lb-table th { text-align: left; padding: 12px 16px; font-weight: 900; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-muted, #78716c); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-warm, #f0e0b8); } .ds-lb-table td { padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-warm, #f0e0b8); } .ds-lb-table tr:hover td { background: #fffbeb; } .ds-lb-rank { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; color: var(--color-muted, #78716c); } .ds-lb-name { font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-ink, #1c1917); } .ds-lb-pos { font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-win, #f97316); } .ds-lb-neg { font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-loss, #ef4444); }

narrative.overview: Garage League looks like the on-screen graphics package for a sports broadcast that a friend group built for itself. Every screen is a name bar, a streak chyron, a stat line — the punchy uppercase overlay that flashes at the bottom of the TV telling you who's winning and by how much. The interface talks like a scoreboard graphic, never like a spreadsheet. The system runs warm, not cold: a cream/amber field, with orange as the 'live' tally-light signal meaning win / now / do-this. Type carries the personality — Inter pushed to weight 900, uppercase, tracked. Depth is nearly flat; shadows appear only when something genuinely lifts off the page. It rejects the corporate SaaS dashboard and the childish over-gamified look in equal measure: the humor is dry, the palette grown-up-warm, the loudness broadcast-loud not toy-loud.
keyCharacteristics: Broadcast-graphic voice: uppercase, black-weight, tracked type as the primary material
Warm garage palette — cream field, orange 'live' signal, sand hairlines
Flat by default; elevation reserved for true overlays
Orange = win / primary action, and almost nothing else
Thumb-first: built to be logged one-handed on a phone at a party

rules.name: The Tally-Light Rule
rules.body: Orange means win or primary action — nothing else. It never decorates. Its scarcity is what makes it read as 'live'.

rules.name: The Fills-vs-Writes Rule
rules.body: Live Orange (#f97316) is a fill color; Broadcast Ember (#c2410c, token win-ink) is orange as text. Text on a Live Orange fill is Scoreboard Ink (#1c1917), never white. This keeps every orange element at WCAG AA — white-on-Live-Orange is 2.80:1 and Live-Orange-as-text is 2.64:1; both fail.

rules.name: The No Cold Lines Rule
rules.body: Every border, divider, and rule is Sand (#f0e0b8), never a gray hairline. Cold gray lines are the SaaS-dashboard tell; warm sand keeps the garage.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Inter only. Never pair it with a second sans — hierarchy is built from weight (400 → 900), case, and tracking, never from a new typeface.

rules.name: The Loudest-One-Thing Rule
rules.body: Black-weight uppercase is the brand, but it only works when one thing is loudest per screen. Pick the hero — the winner, the streak, the standing — and let supporting type step down to muted body.

rules.name: The Flat-Field Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest — cream on cream, separated by a sand hairline. A shadow is a verb, not a decoration: it may appear only while an element is actively lifted.

dos: Do keep orange on its leash — Live Orange (#f97316) means win or primary action only. One orange thing per screen wherever possible.
Do build hierarchy from Inter's weight range (400 → 900), case, and tracking — one family, no second typeface.
Do pick one loudest element per screen — the winner, the streak, the standing — and let everything else step down to muted body.
Do use 1px Sand (#f0e0b8) for every border and divider.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; reserve shadows for elements actively lifting off the page.
Do make everything work one-handed on a phone — real touch targets, the LOG+ pill within thumb reach, nothing important behind a hover.
Do pair every win/loss and hot/cold signal with text, sign, or emoji — never color alone.
Do ship a visible focus state (orange border or amber ring) with every focus:outline-none.
donts: Don't drift toward a corporate SaaS analytics dashboard — no cold gray/blue chrome, no sterile hero-metric card grid, no gray hairline rules.
Don't go childish or over-gamified — no cartoon mascots, confetti storms, or Duolingo-style badge overload.
Don't reach for the generic AI-template startup look — no purple gradients, no glassmorphism, no floating 3D blobs, no tracked eyebrow above every section.
Don't let Poker (or anything) slide into gambling/sportsbook slickness — keep the friendly-ledger warmth, not a neon betting board.
Don't nest a card inside a card, ever.
Don't put a drop shadow on a resting surface — if it's not actively lifting, it's flat.
Don't use a second font family to create emphasis — that's what weight is for.
Don't set label, title, and value all at max loudness; if everything shouts, nothing does.
Don't use muted stone body text on the cream field below 4.5:1 — bump toward Scoreboard Ink when contrast is close.
